pi_items.source: setup_woocommerce.sh line 228: wp wc product_cat create --name='Clothing'; setup_task.sh lines 26-29 queries this category

WooCommerce official documentation (https://woocommerce.com/document/product-csv-importer-exporter/) and GitHub Product CSV Import Schema (https://github.com/woocommerce/woocommerce/wiki/Product-CSV-Import-Schema) confirm these exact column header names
All listed columns are confirmed as real WooCommerce CSV export columns per GitHub Product CSV Import Schema and WooCommerce documentation
Referenced in task.json line 20, export_result.sh line 11, and setup_task.sh line 13

privileged_info_summary: This task involves exporting WooCommerce products from the 'Clothing' category to a CSV file with specific columns. The target_category 'Clothing' is created during environment setup (setup_woocommerce.sh line 228). The required columns are the standard WooCommerce CSV headers: SKU, Name, and Regular price. All forbidden columns listed are confirmed as real WooCommerce export fields. The output must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/clothing_prices.csv. The data is synthetic, created programmatically via WP-CLI in the setup scripts: the Clothing category may be populated with fallback test products (Basic White Tee with SKU TEE-WHT-001 at $19.99 and Blue Jeans with SKU JNS-BLU-001 at $49.99) if the environment doesn't initially have Clothing products.
